title: Soul Necromancy
description: Be able to bring mobs back to life with a custom item which can be refilled by right clicking a custom block called a soul core
body: Adds a new item to the game called the Soul Flint n' Steel which when right clicked on a mob head it resurects the mob and the Soul Flint n' Steel item can be re charged by right clicking a new custom block called a Soul Core Block which holds the energy of souls
